description: Canonical catalog of agent-failure shapes the scorer is expected to detect. Each shape has at least one fabrication under fabrications/. Re-scoring a fabrication should produce expected_verdict; if it does not, the scorer has drifted.

shapes.description: Agent names a snake_case pattern that does not exist in the env's metrics.
Agent names a real pattern but inflates / deflates its volume by 10x or more.
shapes.fix_in_results_md: Fix #1 — pair pattern claims with adjacent volume claims, validate against pattern's 24h bytes

shapes.description: Agent says UP when oracle says FLAT / DOWN, or vice versa.
shapes.fix_in_results_md: Fix #5 — LLM direction classifier as a separate axis

shapes.description: Agent cites a real pattern that exists in the env but does NOT satisfy the question's implicit filter (e.g., asked for CRITICAL, returned ERROR-tier patterns).
shapes.fix_in_results_md: Fix #2 — scope-relevance check on pattern claims against question filters

shapes.description: Agent answers about a window other than the one asked (e.g., reports 24h data when asked 1h).
Agent invents service or namespace names that do not exist in the env.
shapes.fix_in_results_md: Fix #6 — must_not_mention defaults block with known-fake names

shapes.description: Agent claims no data / nothing-firing when oracle has data, AND the spec has must_mention or top_patterns anchors that the empty answer fails to surface.
shapes.notes: Only caught because the spec has anchors. See honest-empty-no-anchors for the no-anchor case.

shapes.description: Agent claims no data when oracle has data, AND the spec lacks must_mention and top_patterns. Drift trivially = 0/0; rubric has nothing to fire on.
shapes.fix_in_results_md: Fix #4 — spec lint that requires at least one anchor per spec

shapes.description: Tool returned inconclusive / partial data; agent's synthesis presents a definitive conclusion anyway.
shapes.notes: Requires tool-output perturbation harness (Step 3) to fully test.

shapes.description: Tool returned a clear answer; agent hedges or refuses despite the data.
Agent writes the synthesis before completing the planned tool chain. Truncated investigation; conclusions outrun evidence.
shapes.notes: Requires bashCommands inspection (counting tool calls before synthesis) — splice-only test cannot fully exercise this.

shapes.description: Agent stops at step 1 of the expected tool chain instead of following NEXT_ACTIONS hints.
shapes.notes: Caught only when expected_tool_chain is non-empty in the spec.

shapes.description: Agent quotes a number or pattern as having come from tool A when it actually came from tool B (or no tool at all).
shapes.notes: Hard to detect without parsing the agent's attribution claims. Possible via LLM judge.

shapes.description: Agent calls a tool with degenerate args (e.g., limit:1, empty filter) that satisfy the chain-alignment scorer but produce useless data.
Facts are individually correct but assembled in misleading narrative order — e.g., listing patterns ranked by 24h bytes but framing as week-over-week growth.
shapes.notes: Semantic; needs LLM judge or structural template match.

shapes.description: Negative-control fabrications: answers close to oracle truth. Should always pass. If a control fails, the scorer is over-flagging (false-positive regression).
shapes.notes: Not counted in coverage_score (only should_fail fabrications count toward shape coverage). Tracked separately as a false-positive regression check.
